name: Vegetable Rice Bake
recipeInstructions:
or chopped broccoli
In a saucepan combine bouillon granules and 1 1/2 cups water. Bring to boiling; add rice. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until tender.
Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan combine green pepper and 1/2 cup water. Bring to boiling; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 2 minutes. Add shredded zucchini or chopped broccoli. Cover and simmer for 3-5 minutes or until crisp-tender; drain well. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl combine eggs, milk, onion powder, basil, oregano, and 1/8 teaspoon salt.
Stir cheddar cheese and cream cheese into hot rice. Stir rice mixture into egg mixture. Stir in cooked vegetables and pimento. Spoon into a 10x6x2-inch baking dish.
Bake, uncovered, in an oven preheated to 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until center is set. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
